free_text: Interaction of high-energy protons and alpha particles
The targets were prepared from sheets of cellulose
acetate containing known amounts of iodine in the form
of iodoform. The iodine content of the films was rough
The target consisted of a stack of foils in the
film, 1-mil aluminum, 3-mil aluminum monitor of known
The over-all experimental accuracy of the
measurements was approximately +-25% for the nuclides
with known decay schemes and for the incident energies
at which the monitor cross section had been measured.
